name: Fasting-mimicking diet biological-age and disease-risk marker analysis
summary: A secondary and exploratory analysis of FMD clinical samples from NCT02158897 with replication context from NCT04150159.
population: Adults participating in completed fasting-mimicking diet clinical studies

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Caloric Restriction Mimetics because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers in Adults participating in completed fasting-mimicking diet clinical studies. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
